_comment: Akamai Account Protector — credential stuffing + account takeover (ATO) protection for /api/v1/auth/*. Uses Akamai's ML model trained on billions of auth events. See docs/AKAMAI_DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md.

detectionRules.name: Credential stuffing attack
detectionRules.comments: Require 2 out of 3 signals to fire to reduce false positives.

detectionRules.name: Brute force single account
detectionRules.comments: Account lockout must be coordinated with backend/session_secret.py.

detectionRules.name: Account takeover (ATO) indicators
detectionRules.comments: Require 2FA / email verification before sensitive action.

detectionRules.name: Credential dump detection (newly compromised credentials)
detectionRules.comments: Akamai integrates with HaveIBeenPwned to detect compromised credentials.

headers.name: Akamai-Account-Risk-Score
headers.comments: 0-100 risk score for this login attempt — backend can use for adaptive auth.

headers.name: Akamai-Account-Action
headers.comments: ALLOW / CHALLENGE / BLOCK — backend can act on this instead of Akamai blocking.

notifications.comments: Webhook receives JSON alerts — point to backend endpoint like /api/v1/admin/security/alerts.
